ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., recall, recognition) */,
  "num_trials" INTEGER /* Number of trials in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "participant_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_path" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus (e.g., image, audio) */,
  "stim_cat_num" INTEGER /* Numerical category of the stimulus */,
  "stim_cat_superord" TEXT /* Superordinate category of the stimulus */,
  "stim_cat_subord" TEXT /* Subordinate category of the stimulus */,
  "stim_oldnew" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the stimulus is old (1) or new (2) */,
  "stim_firstphase" INTEGER /* Indicates the first phase in which the stimulus was presented */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, audio, video) */,
  "stimulus_size" INTEGER /* Size of the stimulus file */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who participated in the trial */,
  "trial_order" INTEGER /* Order of the trial within the experiment */,
  "conditioned_cat" INTEGER /* Conditioned category of the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., practice, experimental) */,
  "trial_correctness" TEXT /* Correctness of the trial (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_stimuli" (
  "trial_stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-stimulus pair */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus presented in the trial */,
  "stimulus_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stimulus presentation within the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial-stimulus pair */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the participant to respond */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_stimulus_id") REFERENCES trial_stimuli ("trial_stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the phase belongs to */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the phase */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the phase */,
  "phase_type" TEXT /* Type of phase (e.g., encoding, retrieval) */,
  "phase_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions given during the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phases_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_trials" (
  "phase_trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase-trial pair */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phase_trials_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phase_trials_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulus_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "superordinate_categories" (
  "superord_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each superordinate category */,
  "superord_name" TEXT /* Name of the superordinate category */,
  "superord_description" TEXT /* Description of the superordinate category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("superord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subordinate_categories" (
  "subord_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subordinate category */,
  "subord_name" TEXT /* Name of the subordinate category */,
  "subord_description" TEXT /* Description of the subordinate category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_phases" (
  "experiment_phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-phase pair */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase */,
  "phase_order" INTEGER /* Order of the phase within the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_phases_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_phases_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_stimuli" (
  "phase_stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase-stimulus pair */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus used in the phase */,
  "stimulus_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stimulus presentation within the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phase_stimuli_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phase_stimuli_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "experiment_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the experiment */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Average reaction time of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_metrics" (
  "participant_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant metric */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the participant */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Average reaction time of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_metrics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
